abort.no_devices_found: No devices found on the network
abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single configuration possible.

error.invalid_code: Setup Code not valid. Code is 4-digit!

confirm.description: Do you want to start setup?

discovery_confirm.description:
Please enter your Setup Code obtained from Vimar Pro app.
Refer to the official documentation for additional info [here]({url_documentation})
discovery_confirm.title: VIMAR By-me Plus HUB

user.description:
Use the Discovery for a easier setup or fill the following values.
Refer to the official documentation for additional info [here]({url_documentation})

abort.nothing_to_configure: There is currently nothing to configure for this integration.

counters.title: Pulse counter type
counters.description: For every Vimar pulse counter, pick the meter it is wired to (electricity / water / gas). Detected counters: {counters}

realtime.title: Real-time auto-refresh interval
realtime.description: For each device with a real-time update button, set the interval (in seconds) at which the integration should automatically request fast updates from the gateway. 0 disables the auto-refresh for that device. Range: 0–{max_seconds}s. Detected buttons: {count}.

restart.name: Restart integration
restart.description: Reload the VIMAR By-me Plus HUB integration. Useful from automations to recover from a stuck connection.

entry_id.name: Gateway
entry_id.description: Optional config entry to reload. Leave empty to reload every configured Vimar gateway.
